---
title: "Outreach"
toc: true
---

## Public Lectures

### The Turbulent Interstellar Medium  
**Public lecture**, Observatoire de Paris — 2024  

📄 [Slides (PDF)](files/outreach/turbulent_ism_2024.pdf)

Short description of the talk if you wish (optional).  
For example: an introduction to the physics of the interstellar medium and how turbulence shapes star-forming clouds.


---

### Magnetic Fields in the Galaxy  
**Public lecture**, Nuit de la Science — 2023  

📄 [Slides (PDF)](files/outreach/magnetic_fields_galaxy.pdf)

A presentation on the role of magnetic fields in the structure and evolution of the interstellar medium.

---

## Conferences for a General Audience

### How Stars Are Born  
**Public conference**, Université PSL — 2022  

📄 [Slides (PDF)](files/outreach/star_formation_public.pdf)

Overview of star formation processes in molecular clouds.

---

### The Structure of the Interstellar Medium  
**Seminar**, Science festival — 2021  

📄 [Slides (PDF)](files/outreach/ism_structure_public.pdf)

---

## Teaching / Pedagogical Presentations

### Turbulence in Astrophysics  
**Pedagogical lecture**, ENS — 2023  

📄 [Slides (PDF)](files/outreach/turbulence_teaching.pdf)

---

## Media and Public Engagement

- Interview on interstellar turbulence — *Radio program*, 2023  
- Public round table on astronomy — *Science Festival*, 2022

---

## Notes

Most slides are in **PDF format** and are intended for a **general audience**.  
Some content may overlap with academic lectures or conference material.

## Public Talks

- **The Turbulent Interstellar Medium**  
  Observatoire de Paris, 2024  
  📄 [Slides](files/outreach/turbulent_ism_2024.pdf)

- **Magnetic Fields in the Galaxy**  
  Nuit de la Science, 2023  
  📄 [Slides](files/outreach/magnetic_fields_galaxy.pdf)

- **How Stars Are Born**  
  Université PSL, 2022  
  📄 [Slides](files/outreach/star_formation_public.pdf)

::: {.callout-note icon="megaphone"}
These talks are intended for a **general audience** and require no prior background in astrophysics.
:::
